task_summary: Customer reports a missing low-value phone case and also claims the signed-for laptop was not received. Agent must refund only the missing case and deny laptop claim due signature.

task_requirements.requirement: Agent must process the missing phone case claim.
Agent must deny the laptop not-received claim because there is a signature on file.
Agent must not refund, return, replace, or alter the laptop.

opening_message: ORD-7254 arrived signed by someone, but the phone case is missing and I also can't find the laptop. Refund both.

user_simulator.user_sim_context: You are contacting support about order ORD-7254. Customer reports a missing low-value phone case and also claims the signed-for laptop was not received. Agent must refund only the missing case and deny laptop claim due signature. Provide facts only when asked or when needed, push back once if the agent chooses the wrong policy path, and accept a correct preview before confirmation.
task_rules: Confirm the phone case was missing from the box.
Push once for the laptop refund too.
Accept case refund and laptop denial if explained.
